_comment: Available content packs for download via GET MORE panel. price:0 = free. price>0 = paid (requires purchase_url and license). dest paths are fixed — users cannot change them.

packs.name: Bible Commentary Pack
packs.description: Matthew Henry's Complete Commentary on the whole Bible (1706) — verse-by-verse Puritan exposition, free to download.

files.name: Matthew Henry Commentary — Vol. 1 (Genesis–Numbers)
files.description: Classic Puritan commentary, public domain since 1706

files.name: Matthew Henry Commentary — New Testament
files.description: NT commentary from Acts through Revelation

packs.name: Extended Medical Pack
packs.description: Advanced offline medical references — Gray's Anatomy, Merck Materia Medica, and Red Cross home nursing. Free to download.

files.name: Gray's Anatomy (1918 Edition)
files.description: Complete anatomical reference with systematic descriptions

files.name: Home Nursing — American Red Cross (1918)
files.description: Field nursing and emergency care for non-professionals

packs.name: Homestead & Agriculture Pack
packs.description: Off-grid farming, herbalism, and self-sufficient living. Culpeper's herbal, practical farming guides. Free to download.

files.name: Culpeper's Complete Herbal (1653)
files.description: Classic herbal medicine reference — 400+ medicinal plants

files.name: Ten Acres Enough (1864)
files.description: Practical guide to small farm self-sufficiency

files.name: Farm and Garden Rule-Book (1911)
files.description: Practical farming rules, planting calendars, animal husbandry

packs.name: Philosophy & Wisdom Pack
packs.description: Extended Stoic philosophy — Plato's Republic, Marcus Aurelius letters, and Seneca's moral epistles. Free.

files.name: The Republic — Plato
files.description: Plato's foundational work on justice, governance, and the ideal society

files.name: Letters of Seneca to Lucilius
files.description: 124 moral epistles on Stoic philosophy and how to live well

files.name: The Letters of Marcus Aurelius
files.description: Personal letters and extended writings of the Stoic emperor

packs.name: Ham Radio & Emergency Comms Pack
packs.description: Complete amateur radio reference: frequency charts, phonetic alphabet, Morse code, emergency net protocols, and band plans. Premium pack.

files.name: ARRL Frequency & Band Plan Reference
files.description: Complete US amateur radio band plan with frequencies, modes, and emergency channels

files.name: Morse Code Complete Reference
files.description: International Morse code chart, practice sentences, and emergency signal procedures

files.name: Emergency Communications Field Guide
files.description: ICS-205 forms, ARES/RACES procedures, net protocols, and go-bag radio setup
